# convex

Convex backend: schema, mutations, queries, actions, crons.

## Testing

Tests: `__tests__/convex/` (Vitest + convex-test)

Use `convexTest(schema)` from `convex-test` and the factory helpers in `__tests__/convex/_helpers.ts` to create users, gyms, and sessions. Run with `npm run test:convex`.
